MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Larry Paul's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories (set #2) and to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. The matters set forth in plaintiff's requests for admissions (set #1) are ordered admitted. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $410 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
